channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Burnt bin, 17th May
item.description:
Needs to be removed replaced bin

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Felixstowe Road, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Both stop lines have faded., 17th May
item.description:
Both stop lines have faded.
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Stop line pole 1 side has fade, Raise, 17th May
item.description:
Stop line pole 1 side has fade, Raise
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Friday 15/5/26 1.30pm - Human Forest bike carelessly and obstructive dumped on busy footway by Penge East Station footbridge (N side) at the jct of Newlands Park and Linden Grove., 17th May
item.description:
Friday 15/5/26 1.30pm - Human Forest bike carelessly and obstructive dumped on busy footway by Penge East Station footbridge (N side) at the jct of Newlands Park and Linden Grove. Sorry for the delay of 1 day in reporting these, so this bikes may have been moved since, but this is a daily occurrence, eyesore and obstacle course for sighted persons and those with wheelchairs, mobility aids and pushchairs, and blind / partially sighted persons.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Linden Grove, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Friday 15/5/26 1.30pm - 3 Lime bikes carelessly and obstructive dumped on busy footway by Penge East Station footbridge (N side) at the jct of Newlands Park and Linden Grove, 17th May
item.description:
Friday 15/5/26 1.30pm - 3 Lime bikes carelessly and obstructive dumped on busy footway by Penge East Station footbridge (N side) at the jct of Newlands Park and Linden Grove. Sorry for the delay of 1 day in reporting these, so the bikes may have been moved since, but this is a daily occurrence, eyesore and obstacle course for sighted persons and those with wheelchairs, mobility aids and pushchairs, and blind / partially sighted persons.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Linden Grove, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Small street cabinet cover missing exposing electrical wires on the zinc finished cabinet about 30cm high x 15cm x 15cm at the back edge of the footway on Newlands Park facing, but on the opposite side of the road from the parade of shops by Penge East Station, about 5m from the jct with Lennard Rd., 17th May
item.description:
Small street cabinet cover missing exposing electrical wires on the zinc finished cabinet about 30cm high x 15cm x 15cm at the back edge of the footway on Newlands Park facing, but on the opposite side of the road from the parade of shops by Penge East Station, about 5m from the jct with Lennard Rd.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Newlands Park, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Couple in tent, 17th May
item.description:
A couple has been sleeping rough in the park for over two weeks and now appear to have set up a tent there. We have witnessed the man physically assaulting the woman, and have also seen him sitting outside the library drinking beer along with another man who seems to be aimlessly wandering the area for the last year. There appears to be a growing number of vulnerable people in the area, with little visible intervention or support from London Borough of Bromley
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): The Crossway, Mottingham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 45 degrees rotated triangular traffic sign near the bus stop fronting 189, Anerley Rd, Anerley nr jct Betts Way, 17th May
item.description:
45 degrees rotated triangular traffic sign near the bus stop fronting 189, Anerley Rd, Anerley nr jct Betts Way.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Anerley Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole in bus stop cage, fronting 191, Anerley Rd, Anerley or on the opposite side of the road from the jct with Betts Way., 17th May
item.description:
Pothole in bus stop red tarmac cage, fronting 191, Anerley Rd, Anerley or on the opposite side of the road from the jct with Betts Way. About 0.75m x 0.3m x 4cm deep. I nearly tripped on it crossing the road. The defect has white paint markings around it but they are worn and faded, so perhaps this hole has been overlooked.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Anerley Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tags on green telecomms cabinet in Betts Way, Anerley about 10m from the jct with Anerley Rd., 17th May
item.description:
Tags on green telecomms cabinet in Betts Way, Anerley about 10m from the jct with Anerley Rd.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Betts Way, Anerley, Greater London

item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Station Road, Penge, Greater London

item.title: Flyposter and grafitti on Budgen's green metal newspaper cabinet, 4, The Parade, Croydon Rd, Penge about 20m from the jct with Anerley Rd, Anerley, 17th May
item.description:
Flyposter and grafitti on Budgen's green metal newspaper cabinet, 4, The Parade, Croydon Rd, Penge about 20m from the jct with Anerley Rd, Anerley. There may be other tags on the frontage too - seen briefly from moving vehicle.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 4, Croydon Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Croydon Rd Penge about 3m from the jct with Anerley Rd, Anerley, fronting a residential fence, on a black metal street cabinet is fly posted a circa 30cm x 50cm poster, possibly self adhesive., 17th May
item.description:

Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Drain cover noise, 16th May
item.description:
Due to the road works from Thames Water and that part of Chislehurst Road only had one lane. There is a loose drain cover which is being driven over by every vehicle and is very loud and a disturbance.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Upperton Road, Longlands, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Streetlight too bright, 16th May
item.description:
Why is this streetlight next to the flats in Brenchley Gardens so bright so that it illuminates the gardens behind?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 145-159, Brenchley Gardens, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned car, 16th May
item.description:
Car is taxed but need to find the owner as it has a flat and has been here for months.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 58, Breakspears Drive, St Paul's Cray, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pavement up, 16th May
item.description:
Pavement has been up for a long time. Today and a few days ago tripped on Pavement. Next to Fern Lodge play park and basketball court

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Esam Way, West Norwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipped sofa at beginning of Curtis Way, 16th May
item.description:
Black leather sofa flytipped on Curtis Way, please clear

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Curtis Street, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bags of abandoned litter fly-tipped, 16th May
item.description:
An ongoing issue of someone abandoning rubbish here, dozens of bags a week
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Stanborough Passage, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Human faeces and urine, 16th May
item.description:
Several people have urinated and/or deficated leaving faeces and large amount of urine in the area.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Stanborough Passage, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet
